# Artifacts Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-artifacts
kind: Artifacts
spec:
  artifacts:
    - source:
        amd64:
          bundle:
            root: files
            path: bin/linux/amd64/example
        arm64:
          bundle:
            root: files
            path: bin/linux/arm64/example
      install:
        path: /usr/local/bin/example
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Artifacts
spec:
  artifacts:
    - source:
        amd64:
          bundle:
            root: files
            path: bin/linux/amd64/runc
        arm64:
          bundle:
            root: files
            path: bin/linux/arm64/runc
      install:
        path: /usr/local/sbin/runc
        mode: "0755"
```
